message:
Add NATS max_payload enforcement, producer E2E test, and formatting fix

nats.rs: Add MAX_READ_BUFFER constant (8 MiB) to bound memory growth
from fast servers. Enforce server's max_payload limit during CONNECT
handshake — if the server advertises a smaller max_payload than the
client config, clamp to the server's value to prevent rejected publishes.

e2e_messaging.rs: Add e2e_kafka_producer_delivery_ack_metadata test
exercising deterministic delivery metadata — verifies topic, partition,
monotonic offset increments across sequential sends, flush completion,
and blank topic rejection. Also imports KafkaProducer/ProducerConfig/
KafkaError directly and simplifies the consumer lifecycle error match.

sqlite.rs: Format the Debug impl's needs_rollback field to satisfy
rustfmt line-length rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
